content.full_text:
April 16, 2004

Jo Purcell
City Clerk
City of Rancho Palos Verdes
30940 Hawthorne Blvd.
Rancho Palos Verdes, CA 90275

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-085

Dear Ms. Purcell:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of April 15, 2004, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
